# 申请资源入口信息
权限申请：
申请入口[amd service-now]([AMD ServiceNow Portal - AMD Service Portal (service-now.com)](https://amd.service-now.com/sp?id=service_portal_home))
搜索 GitHub.com (SaaS) Request
最终入口:
[GitHub.com (SaaS) Request - AMD Service Portal (service-now.com)](https://amd.service-now.com/sp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=eb2a998b1be514d487852f8a2d4bcba3)]([GitHub.com (SaaS) Request - AMD Service Portal (service-now.com)](https://amd.service-now.com/sp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=eb2a998b1be514d487852f8a2d4bcba3))

申请GitHub Organization ：
AMD ACP
AMD-DC-GPU 
ROCm 
AMD-DCGPU-Networking 
AMD-DC-Perf 

# Conductor 申请步骤
Step 1: Team members must go to techprotect ([User Control Page](https://techprotect.amd.com/access/user_control/ "https://techprotect.amd.com/access/user_control/")) and request access these groups, search for the names in the "group/project" field

Group 1: **mi300_labremote.china (team set up specifically for the China team members under and also**

Group 2: **mi308_remote.china**

Group 3: **mi358_remote.china**

![image](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

[chprotect.amd.com/access/user_control/](https://techprotect.amd.com/access/user_control/ "https://techprotect.amd.com/access/user_control/"))please fill out any other requirements you will need

- **mi300_labremote.china** (select Michael Hargett as approver)
- **mi308_remote.china** (select Michael Hargett as approver)
- **mi358_remote.china** (select Greg Kitchens/Vinod Ramadurai as approver)
- NDA general (please complete that yourself)

1. Please log onto conductor: [https://conductor.amd.com/login](https://conductor.amd.com/login "https://conductor.amd.com/login") (using your AMD network id account). You will be able to see the details of all the systems in the conductor.
2. Please request Unix Access: [How to -- request UNIX group access, SNOW/TechProtect/IDM(Role Account) - Methodology Infrastructure - Confluence (amd.com)](https://confluence.amd.com/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=794021531 "https://confluence.amd.com/pages/viewpage.action?pageid=794021531") if you do not have one

smc300x-clt-r4c9-26.cs-clt.dcgpu - TF1.15 & TF1.12

# BMC LOGIN
``` shell
https://{BMC_IP}
runup kvm
systemctl start sshd
```

# AMD Linux VDI access
As requested we have enabled Unix access for the UID yuechguo in AMD LDAP  
``` shell
{  
"Action" = "Updated loginshell",  
"DN" = "uid=yuechguo,ou=People,dc=amdldap,dc=com",  
"Result" = "Success",  
"value" = "/tool/pandora/bin/tcsh"  
}
```

``` c++
clr/hipamd/src/hip_memmory.cpp
hipError_t ihipMalloc(void** ptr, size_t sizeBytes, unsigned int flags)

LogPrintfError("APinned Memory, src=0x%zx, size :%zu", *ptr, sizeBytes);

clr/rocclr/device/rocm/rocblit.cpp
bool DmaBlitManager::hsaCopyStaged(const_address hostSrc, address hostDst, size_t size,address staging, bool hostToDev) const {

ClPrint(amd::LOG_NONE, amd::LOG_COPY, "HSA Async Copy staged H2D dst=0x%zx, src=0x%zx, size=%ld", hostDst + offset,  hostSrc, size);
```
